name: trendyol-integration-developer-tool
description: Developer tool for Trendyol Marketplace Product Integration APIs (TR, V2, International). Endpoint discovery, integration planning, payload validation, curl generation, test fixtures, and async batch tracking via MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Expert guidance for Trendyol Marketplace seller product integrations
interface.longDescription: Plan, validate, and implement Trendyol Marketplace Product Integration APIs. Covers catalog lookup, product onboarding, inventory & price sync, product update, lifecycle management, and async batch tracking. Supports TR and International marketplaces. Grounded in a live MCP server — never relies on training data for API contracts.
